title: June 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 16''' is the 167th day of the year (168th in leap years), with 198 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Michael Culver]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Kale Browne]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Bong Dazo]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Jan Bazaldúa]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[James Patrick Stuart]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[As Long As We Live...]]'' ends publication.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Olivia Hack]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Vitas Varnas]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 9: Demon|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Demon'' trade paperback]] published.
*2010 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: In Service of the Republic (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars: In Service of the Republic'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' wins two [[Wikipedia:Daytime Emmy Award|Daytime Emmys]] at the [[Wikipedia:40th Daytime Emmy Awards|40th Daytime Emmy Awards]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Training]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 14|''Star Wars'' (2020) 14]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 5|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 5]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The New Republic Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: A New Hope — The Manga Vol. 1]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
